title: Adoption of rules
doc_html:
§3120.  Adoption of rules

The adoption of any rule or regulation, guideline, substantive procedure, or code of conduct shall be subject to the provisions of the Administrative Procedure Act.  

Added by Acts 1983, No. 508, §5.
